lead: Exploring the intersection of education and technology, recent stories highlight the evolving landscape of learning, the impact of AI, and the challenges faced by educational institutions.

stories.title: CMMI Certifications: A Complete Guide
stories.summary: The Capability Maturity Model Integration (CMMI) offers a framework for organizations to enhance their processes and improve product and service development. With the latest update focusing on AI integration and agile methodologies, CMMI certifications are becoming increasingly relevant for professionals aiming to advance their careers in tech-driven environments. This guide details various CMMI certifications, their prerequisites, and the training courses available.

stories.title: US Students on Why They Booed Their Pro-AI Graduation Speakers
stories.summary: Graduates from Middle Tennessee State University expressed their concerns about AI during a commencement speech, booing a speaker who touted AI's potential. Many students feel that AI poses a threat to their future job prospects, revealing a growing disconnect between educational institutions and the realities graduates face in the workforce. This incident underscores the need for a more nuanced discussion about the role of AI in education and employment.

stories.title: Ransom ‘Paid’ to Hackers Who Crippled Online Learning in Australia
stories.summary: A significant cyberattack has impacted over 120 educational institutions in Australia, leading to a ransom payment to hackers who compromised online learning systems. This breach highlights the vulnerabilities in educational technology infrastructure, raising concerns about data security and the continuity of learning in digital environments. The incident serves as a wake-up call for schools and universities to bolster their cybersecurity measures.
